name: Gundakriya
notes: Janya of Mayamalavagowla (15th melakarta); audava raga (5 notes ascending and descending); ārohana S R1 G3 M1 N3 S, avarohana S N3 M1 G3 R1 S; evokes pathos and devotion; a rare raga used primarily in the early segments of a concert; best known for Tyagaraja's 'Intanuchu Varimpa'
